events.title: OH WHUPS
events.body: Oopadays. You've lost half your cards.

events.title: NOWHERE TO POO
events.body: Can't seem to find the right spot… just gonna look around for 3 turns.

events.title: JUST SNIFFIN'
events.body: Slow progress. Routes require an extra card for the rest of the game. Stacks up to +2.

events.title: GIMME GIMME
events.body: Nabbed! Pick an opponent and steal 3 of their cards.

events.title: BRIGHT BROWN
events.body: Choose a colour. Steal all cards of that colour from every opponent.

events.title: ZOOMIES
events.body: Zoom zoom zoom. Next time you move, make a second move for free.

events.title: POOP
events.body: Drop a log, slow down your opponent! Carry it and choose when to drop.

events.title: HITCH A LIFT
events.body: Dad's here to give a ride! Travel immediately to your next destination. Routes release, chain advances.

events.title: RAINBOW WARRIOR
events.body: All rainbow cards are mine! Steal every rainbow card from all opponents.

events.title: BIN DIPPER
events.body: Have a rummage around and pick five tasty treats from the discard pile.
